ai.title: Claude Fable 5 mien phi het ngay mai 22/6 - tu 23/6 phai dung usage credits
ai.summary: Anthropic ra mat Claude Fable 5 ngay 9/6/2026 va bao gom mien phi trong goi Pro, Max, Team va Enterprise den het ngay 22/6. Tu 23/6, nguoi dung phai dung usage credits: $10/trieu input token va $50/trieu output token, gap doi so voi Opus 4.8. Anthropic ly giai do nhu cau cao vuot du bao va se co gang mo rong cua so mien phi neu may chu dap ung duoc; Fable 5 co context window 1 trieu token va toi da 128.000 output token moi request.
ai.why_it_matters: Hom nay la ngay cuoi cung dung Fable 5 mien phi, nguoi dung Claude Code goi Pro/Max nen tranh thu cho cac tac vu complex coding, agentic workflow dai va phan tich long-context truoc khi credits bat dau tinh tu ngay mai 23/6.

ai.title: Claude Code 2.1.185 - hint gio cho API hien sau 20 giay thay vi 10 giay
ai.summary: Phien ban moi nhat Claude Code 2.1.185 thay doi hint stream-stall: hien thi 'Waiting for API response - will retry in ...' va chi bat sau 20 giay im lang thay vi 10 giay cu, giam tinh trang bao gio gia khi API xu ly cham. Day la phien ban moi nhat tinh den 21/6, phat hanh sat sau 2.1.183 (19/6) voi cac sua loi lien quan den sandbox, scroll va cursor.
ai.why_it_matters: Nguoi dung Claude Code hang ngay se it bi gian doan hon khi API phan hoi cham, dac biet trong cac tac vu agentic dai co nhieu buoc xu ly lien tiep phat sinh khi lam du an lon.

ai.title: Claude Code 2.1.183 - auto mode tu dong chan lenh git pha huy, canh bao model sap xoa
ai.summary: Phien ban 2.1.183 (19/6/2026) bo sung bao ve quan trong cho auto mode: tu dong chan cac lenh git co the mat du lieu (git reset --hard, git checkout., git clean) khi nguoi dung khong yeu cau ro rang xoa du lieu. Cung trong ban nay them canh bao deprecation cho cac model sap bi tu dong cap nhat, va bo sung cai dat attribution.sessionUrl cho phep bo qua duong dan session trong commit message.
ai.why_it_matters: Bao ve quan trong cho nguoi dung Claude Code: tu nay agent o auto mode se khong tu y xoa code hoac reset branch, giup an toan hon khi de agent lam viec dai han tren codebase quan trong.

ai.title: Anthropic Python SDK 0.110.0 chinh thuc ho tro tool code_execution noi tuyen
ai.summary: Phien ban 0.110.0 (18/6/2026) cua anthropic-sdk-python bo sung ho tro chinh thuc cho tool code_execution_20260120, cho phep model Claude chay code noi tuyen trong qua trinh suy luan ma khong can setup tool ben ngoai. Cung trong dot 18/6, phien ban 0.111.0 them tag refusal-fallback middleware giup developer theo doi khi fallback duoc kich hoat, va sua loi header x-stainless-helper bi ghi de nhieu lan.
ai.why_it_matters: Tool code_execution mo kha nang Claude tu tinh toan, chay thu code va kiem tra ket qua truc tiep trong workflow, huu ich cho data analysis, debug va kiem tra logic trong Claude Code ma khong can cai them MCP tool.

ai.title: Microsoft ra mat 7 model MAI moi trong mot dot, hop tac voi Mayo Clinic tao AI y te
ai.summary: Ngay 8/6/2026, Microsoft cong bo 7 model noi bo (Microsoft AI) gom MAI-Transcribe-1 (ghi am SOTA cho 25 ngon ngu theo benchmark FLEURS), MAI-Voice-1 (tong hop giong noi), MAI-Image-2 (xu ly hinh anh), cac model code va reasoning. Song song, Microsoft cong bo hop tac voi Mayo Clinic de cung xay dung frontier model AI chuyen dung cho y te. Day la chien luoc giam phu thuoc vao OpenAI va cung cap them lua chon cho developer tren Microsoft Foundry.
ai.why_it_matters: Microsoft xay dung he sinh thai model rieng, tao canh tranh voi Anthropic va Google, giam rui ro phu thuoc nha cung cap; MAI-Transcribe-1 ho tro tieng Viet co the mo ra ung dung ghi chu tu dong hoac phu de ban hang cho niche nho nhu quan an vat.

daily.desc: Nen output cua tool, log va RAG chunk truoc khi gui vao LLM, giam 60-95% chi phi token ma van giu chat luong phan hoi
Chuyen bat ky trang web nao thanh ung dung desktop nhe bang Rust chi voi mot lenh terminal, ho tro macOS, Windows va Linux
Bo ky nang agent reusable cho lap trinh vien giai quyet 4 van de lon cua AI coding: misalignment, verbosity, code hong va kien truc yeu
MCP server chi muc codebase thanh knowledge graph ben vung, truy van duoi 1ms, ho tro 158 ngon ngu, giam 99% token so voi doc file thu cong
Co so du lieu SQL chay trong process, tuong thich hoan toan voi SQLite, viet bang Rust, toi uu cho edge computing va ung dung mobile

weekly.desc: Nen output cua tool, log va RAG chunk truoc khi gui vao LLM, giam 60-95% chi phi token ma van giu chat luong phan hoi
Cho AI agent kha nang doc va tim kiem toan bo internet (Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu) khong can API key tra phi
Kho tong hop cac kenh IPTV cong khai tu khap the gioi, phan loai theo quoc gia, ngon ngu va the loai
Bo ky nang engineering cap production cho AI coding agent, duoc bien soan boi Addy Osmani, khuyen kien truong cua Google Chrome
MCP server chi muc codebase thanh knowledge graph ben vung, truy van duoi 1ms, ho tro 158 ngon ngu, giam 99% token so voi doc file thu cong

github.trend_note: Ngay 21/6: chopratejas/headroom tiep tuc dan dau voi +3.795 sao hom nay va +14.982 sao tuan nay, khang dinh xu huong toi uu chi phi token LLM la uu tien hang dau cua cong dong dev. tw93/Pake bat ngo tang vot +2.546 sao hom nay, cho thay nhu cau chuyen trang web thanh desktop app nhe vat bang Rust van manh. Tuan nay, addyosmani/agent-skills (+6.332 sao) va mattpocock/skills (+1.395 hom nay) cung noi bat, phan anh xu huong cong dong dang xay dung va chia se bo ky nang agent tai su dung thay vi phu thuoc vao mot cong cu don le.

tech.title: OpenMontage: He thong san xuat video agentic mo nguon dau tien, ket hop Claude Code va Cursor
tech.summary: OpenMontage la he thong san xuat video agentic mo nguon dau tien tren the gioi voi 12 pipeline san xuat (explainer, talking head, animation, documentary, trailer...), 52 tool va hon 500 agent skill. Nguoi dung mo ta bang ngon ngu tu nhien, agent tu thu thap tu lieu tu YouTube, Reddit, Wikipedia, NASA, viet kich ban, tao asset, chinh sua va render video hoan chinh. Ho tro Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot va Windsurf lam dao dien; co nen zero-key chay mien phi hoan toan bang Piper TTS va Archive.org.

tech.title: Kilo Code: Agent coding mo nguon all-in-one cho VS Code, JetBrains, CLI - chon tu 500+ model AI
tech.summary: Kilo Code (Apache-2.0, fork tu Roo Code tu 3/2025) la agent coding mo nguon chay tren VS Code, JetBrains va CLI, cho phep nguoi dung chon tu hon 500 model AI va tra phi truc tiep cho nha cung cap ma khong qua markup. Du an dat top 5 ProductHunt sau 3 thang, top 3 OpenRouter weekly va nhan vong seed $8 trieu USD tu Cota Capital va General Catalyst thang 12/2025. Hien dang GitHub trending voi hon 23.000 sao va +513 hom nay.

tech.title: Startup Viet Nam: Von dau tu giam 87% dau 2026, AI tieng Viet va fintech van la loi the
tech.summary: Von dau tu co phan vao startup Viet Nam dau 2026 chi dat 28,7 trieu USD qua 8 vong, giam 87,35% so voi cung ky 2025. Thi truong hien co hon 16.620 startup va 21,9 ty USD von ghi nhan tich luy. Cac linh vuc van thu hut nha dau tu: fintech, phan mem B2B, AI ngon ngu tieng Viet, chuoi cung ung ban le, edtech gan viec lam va cong nghe cong nghiep.

tech.title: Chinh phu Viet Nam giao 10 bo nganh trien khai 20 linh vuc cong nghe chien luoc
tech.summary: Chinh phu Viet Nam giao nhiem vu cu the cho 10 bo nganh trien khai 20 linh vuc cong nghe chien luoc, chuyen tu giai doan chuan bi sang thuc thi voi muc tieu co san pham, cong nghe va doanh nghiep cu the do luong duoc. Muc tieu dat it nhat 10 doanh nghiep cong nghe lon trong nuoc vao 2030. Cac linh vuc uu tien gom AI, chip ban dan, dien toan dam may, an ninh mang, y te so va giao duc so.

tech.title: withastro/flue: Astro ra mat framework TypeScript xay dung AI agent tu dong voi sandbox bao mat
tech.summary: Nhom Astro tung ra flue (6.089 sao, +316 hom nay), framework TypeScript de xay dung autonomous AI agent co the duy tri context va thuc hien hanh dong that ma khong can kich ban dinh san. Tinh nang noi bat: sandbox bao mat de chay tool an toan, durable execution giu tien trinh khi gap loi, sub-agent theo vai tro chuyen biet, tich hop quan trac OpenTelemetry va Sentry. Ho tro trien khai tren Node.js, Cloudflare Workers va GitHub Actions.

trends.name: Food Jutsu - quai chieu summoning mon an kieu Jujutsu Kaisen
trends.desc: Trend dang viral tren TikTok global thang 6/2026: nguoi tao content dung dong tac 'goi mon an' cam hung tu anime Jujutsu Kaisen, ket hop cut transition nhanh va hieu ung cinematic, mon an hoac do uong hien ra nhu duoc trinh chieu. Sound chinh la Delirious cua Yoshimasa Terui tu nhac phim JJK, ket hop filter anh dong anime.
trends.fit: @tracuami co the ap dung hoan hao voi chan ga sot Thai (sot do noi bat) hoac tra trai cay mau sac dep, ca hai deu hieu qua qua transition anime. Yeu to giong Hue cua A Nguyen khi caption la diem khac biet an tuong so voi food creator khac o Sai Gon hoac Ha Noi.
trends.idea: Clip 15 giay: A Nguyen dua tay ra truoc theo kieu 'an jutsu', cat nhanh sang canh to chan ga sot Thai sang lon va dep, them text overlay kieu chu Nhat 'Chan Ga Jutsu - Sot Thai Arc'. Caption: 'A Nguyen khai an - toc hon set hang nha #foodjutsu #changatracuami #amthuchue #tracuami'

trends.name: Song banh trang nhung nuoc cham muoi - an vat duong pho viral TikTok VN
trends.desc: Trend an vat duong pho dang viral manh tren TikTok Viet Nam: banh trang nhung nhung nuoc cham pha muoi, duoc quay theo dang mukbang, ASMR che bien va clip thu mon lan dau. Mon gian di nhung gay nghien, thu hut hang chuc trieu luot xem nho yeu to xac thuc va khong co kich ban.
trends.fit: @tracuami co the lean vao song nay de doi soi tre tron Hue nhu ban an vat duong pho Hue dac sac hon: cung la mon tron voi nuoc cham dac trung dia phuong nhung phong phu hon voi gai tre, long heo, cha lua va rau song.
trends.idea: Clip 20 giay quay ASMR: A Nguyen tron ba tre vao chau nuoc cham mam tom chua cay, quay gan bat tieng nuoc cham do xuong va tieng va tron ran ran. Caption: 'Hue cung co mon nhu the nay ne - ten goi la Tre Tron, vi con nguoi hon vi pho thong #tretronhue #tracuami #amthuchue #mukbang'

trends.name: Dumpling Lasagna - lam am thuc layer kieu lasagna bang vo banh cuon/banh bao
trends.desc: Trend am thuc viral TikTok global: xep lop nhan thit tron gia vi voi vo banh cuon (wonton wrapper) theo kieu lasagna, sau do hap chin va chan sot len tren. Trend nay viral vi bien mon lam viec nhieu cong (don banh bao) thanh mon don gian xep lop 30 phut, van giu duoc vi dac trung cua banh nhan thit.
trends.fit: @tracuami ban tra sua va tra trai cay, co the tan dung trend nay theo huong 'lam mon tra tung lop': quay clip xep lop da dau, pudding, trai cay va siro vao cup tra sua tung buoc - tao visual dep va cho thay su tham my cua tung ly tra tu khau lam.
trends.idea: Clip 20 giay: quay cham canh A Nguyen do tung nguyen lieu vao cup tra trai cay theo lop (da, nuoc tra, trai cay, toping), ket thuc voi canh ly tra da xong dep mat. Caption: 'Tra trai cay tracuami cung co lop nha - layer by layer nguoi oi #tracuami #tratraicay #amthuchue #layeredfood'

sounds.name: Delirious - Yoshimasa Terui (OST Jujutsu Kaisen)
sounds.desc: Sound chinh cua trend Food Jutsu - dung cho clip reveal mon an voi hieu ung anime cao trao, dang viral manh tren TikTok global thang 6/2026

sounds.name: Em Thua Co Ta remix Vinahouse - hot TikTok VN
sounds.desc: Nhac Vinahouse remix cua hit 'Co ta tot hon em a' dang rat hot tren TikTok Viet Nam, phu hop cho clip gioi thieu quan, day-in-the-life hoac moment vui khi chay quan hang ngay

sounds.name: Nonstop Vinahouse Viet Mix 2026 - nhac nen club
sounds.desc: Cac ban nonstop EDM pha am nhac dan gian Viet dang pho bien TikTok VN, dung lam nhac nen cho clip gioi thieu mon moi, overview quan hoac quang cao ngan

tiktok.note: Tuan 3 thang 6/2026: TikTok co 3 xu huong food phu hop cho niche @tracuami - Food Jutsu (anime JJK) hieu qua nhat voi mon co mau sac noi bat nhu chan ga sot Thai, song banh trang nhung tao co hoi doi soi tre tron Hue la ban an vat dia phuong dac sac hon, va Dumpling Lasagna trend co the adapt thanh clip lam tra trai cay tung lop. Nhac Vinahouse tiep tuc la nen am nhac so mot TikTok VN thang 6. Luu y: du lieu TikTok bi han che do khong truy cap duoc ung dung va trang analytics tra phi, chi xac nhan duoc 3 trend va 3 sound cu the tu ket qua WebSearch.
